steps: Extract each clause with its section number and full text
Classify each clause: mutual cap, one-sided cap, exclusion, indemnity, carve-out
Identify the monetary cap amount and its basis (fees paid, fixed sum, insurance limit)
List carve-outs from the cap: fraud, IP infringement, data breach, wilful misconduct
Flag asymmetric liability structures that disproportionately burden one party
Output as a structured table: Section | Type | Cap Amount | Carve-outs
constraints: preserve exact monetary figures and multipliers
do not paraphrase carve-out language — quote it exactly
failure_modes: missing indirect / consequential loss exclusions buried in definitions
overlooking carve-outs defined by reference to another section
confusing aggregate cap with per-incident cap
ignoring insurance-backed liability clauses that shift risk
